Name: Animal Farm
Author: George Orwell
Quote: All animals are equal, but some animals are more equal than others.

Name: To Kill a Mockingbird
Author: Harper Lee
Quote: You never really understand a person until you consider things from his point of view.

Name: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
Quote: The Answer to the Ultimate Question of Life, the Universe, and Everything is 42.

Name: All-Star Superman
Author: Grant Morrison
Quote: You're much stronger than you think you are. Trust me.

Name: Meditations
Author: Marcus Aurelius
Quote: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.

Name: Frankenstein
Author: Mary Shelley
Quote: Nothing is so painful to the human mind as a great and sudden change.

Name: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Quote: So we beat on, boats against the current, borne back ceaselessly into the past.

Name: The Alchemist
Author: Paulo Coelho
Quote: And, when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.

Name: The Fault in Our Stars
Author: John Green
Quote: I fell in love the way you fall asleep: slowly, and then all at once.

Name: Pride & Prejudice
Author: Jane Austen
Quote: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife.

Name: Bhagavad Gita
Author: Vyasa
Quote: You have a right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.

Name: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
Author: Yuval Noah Harari
Quote: Biology enables, culture forbids.

Name: Norwegian Wood
Author: Haruki Murakami
Quote: If you only read the books that everyone else is reading, you can only think what everyone else is thinking.

Name: The Metamorphosis
Author: Franz Kafka
Quote: As Gregor Samsa awoke one morning from uneasy dreams he found himself transformed in his bed into a gigantic insect.

Name: The Catcher in the Rye
Author: J.D. Salinger
Quote: Don't ever tell anybody anything. If you do, you start missing everybody.

Name: A Man Called Ove
Author: Fredrik Backman
Quote: Loving someone is like moving into a house. At first you fall in love with all the new things, amazed every morning that all this is for you.

Name: Tuesdays with Morrie
Author: Mitch Albom
Quote: Once you learn how to die, you learn how to live.

Name: The Bell Jar
Author: Sylvia Plath
Quote: I took a deep breath and listened to the old brag of my heart: I am, I am, I am.

Name: Man's Search for Meaning
Author: Viktor Frankl
Quote: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.

Name: Brave New World
Author: Aldous Huxley
Quote: Everyone belongs to everyone else.

Name: A Thousand Splendid Suns
Author: Khaled Hosseini
Quote: One could not count the moons that shimmer on her roofs, or the thousand splendid suns that hide behind her walls.

Name: Kite Runner
Author: Khaled Hosseini
Quote: For you, a thousand times over.

Name: Six of Crows
Author: Leigh Bardugo
Quote: No mourners. No funerals.

Author: George Orwell
Quote: War is peace. Freedom is slavery. Ignorance is strength.

Name: The Book Thief
Author: Markus Zusak
Quote: I am haunted by humans.

Name: The Invisible Man
Author: H.G. Wells
Quote: The stranger came early in February, one wintry day, through a biting wind and a driving snow.

Name: Life of Pi
Author: Yann Martel
Quote: I must say a word about fear. It is life's only true opponent.

Name: Hunger Games
Author: Suzanne Collins
Quote: May the odds be ever in your favor.

Name: My Experiments with Truth
Author: Mahatma Gandhi
Quote: The weak can never forgive. Forgiveness is the attribute of the strong.

Name: The Shining
Author: Stephen King
Quote: All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

Name: The Philosopher's Stone
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.

Name: The Chamber of Secrets
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: It is our choices, Harry, that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.

Name: The Vegetarian
Author: Han Kang
Quote: Before my wife turned vegetarian, I'd always thought of her as completely unremarkable in every way.

Name: Looking For Alaska
Author: John Green
Quote: If people were rain, I was drizzle and she was a hurricane.

Name: Prisoner of Azkaban
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: Happiness can be found even in the darkest of times, if one only remembers to turn on the light.

Name: The Goblet of Fire
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: It matters not what someone is born, but what they grow to be.

Name: Order of the Phoenix
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: We've all got both light and dark inside us. What matters is the part we choose to act on.

Name: The Half-Blood Prince
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: Do not pity the dead, Harry. Pity the living, and, above all, those who live without love.

Name: The Deathly Hallows
Author: J.K. Rowling
Quote: Of course it is happening inside your head, Harry, but why on earth should that mean that it is not real?

Name: Think Like a Monk
Author: Jay Shetty
Quote: The mind is like water. When it's turbulent, it's difficult to see. When it's calm, everything becomes clear.

Name: The Almanack of Naval Ravikant
Author: Eric Jorgenson
Quote: A fit body, a calm mind, a house full of love. These things cannot be bought — they must be earned.

Name: Eat Pray Love
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert
Quote: Happiness is the consequence of personal effort.

Name: Four Thousand Weeks
Author: Oliver Burkeman
Quote: The average human lifespan is absurdly, insultingly brief.

Name: Pachinko
Author: Min Jin Lee
Quote: History has failed us, but no matter.

Name: The Song of Achilles
Author: Madeline Miller
Quote: I could recognize him by touch alone, by smell; I would know him blind, by the way his breaths came and his feet struck the earth.

Name: Thinking, Fast and Slow
Author: Daniel Kahneman
Quote: Nothing in life is as important as you think it is while you are thinking about it.
